mantleTargets.architectureNotes: Mantle reth fork serves as the L2 execution client. L2 derivation depends on L1 block header structure and blob format. Key divergence points are gas metering (MNT token) and DA layer integration.

counterpartRelationships.reason: Base and Mantle both track reth / OP Stack execution-client evolution
Mantle reth is a downstream fork of OP-Geth-influenced execution layer
L1 consensus/block structure changes affect L2 derivation
